creator: opentrax@email.com
text:
man page for pstat(8) missing description for -N and -M

Please check page this is my first try at this formatting code.
Also, I don't even understand kvm_*, my fix may not have
all the ramifications of -M and -N.

pstat(8) was referenced from pstat.c Revision 1.52 CVS Tags:HEAD

-M information was pulled from kvm_openfiles(3)
-N also from kvm_openfiles(3)

Fix: 

.It Fl M core
core can be crash dump core generated by savecore(8).
Currently core-dumps not implemented.
.It FL N system
system can be the executable image of a kernel being examined.
It must contain a symbol table.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
